pricing.title: Top up Adstudio without the usual subscription theatre
pricing.body: Buy credits only when you actually need them. Your account keeps the full trail: balance, purchases, receipts, and usage.

trust.body1: Secure payment flow with 3D Secure support and no PCI burden inside the app.
trust.body2: No monthly reset and no surprise countdown sitting over your shoulder.
trust.body3: Every purchase and credit movement stays visible in your account.

pricing.faqTitle: The useful bits, minus the fog

faq.a1: No. Credits accumulate and never expire.
faq.q3: Can I download receipts or invoices?
faq.a3: Yes. From your billing area and, when available, from Stripe's portal.

trail-10.name: Trail
trail-10.description: The light entry point for testing the real flow with real money and almost no drama.

studio-30.name: Studio
studio-30.description: The natural pack for recurring work when you do not want to run out halfway through the second session.

orbit-100.name: Orbit
orbit-100.description: A wider reserve for longer sessions, demanding teams, or several brands asking for attention at once.
orbit-100.tagline: 100 credits to work without staring at the counter

account.title: Billing and credits
account.description: Your balance, purchases, and the full economic trail in one place.

summary.noPack: You have not bought any pack yet

actions.openPortalHelp: Open Stripe to review receipts and saved payment methods.

history.emptyLedger: There is no credit activity yet.

success.title: Payment confirmed
success.description: The credits are already in your account. You can go back to work or top up again.
success.error: We could not confirm the payment yet.

checkout.portalErrorTitle: The payment portal could not be opened
checkout.packMissing: The requested pack does not exist or is no longer active.

admin.title: Packs and payments
admin.description: Control packs, Stripe sync, and track real purchases.
